violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Establishment employs individual with Food Safety Manager license. Establishment must register employee with RIDOH. New Violation. Correct By: 05/09/2026

Cut fruit, cut vegetables and milk poured into dispensing containers was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2026
Ice was observed in Freezer refrigeration unit. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2026

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Establishment has individuals trained as Food Safety Managers. No person is registered with RIDOH. Establishment must register Food Safety Manager. New Violation. Correct By: 05/12/2025

The low boy refrigerator was observed held at 43 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Unit was unplugged, for service establishment is not to use until maintaining temperature below 41DF. All food items moved to Walk in cooler. New Violation. Correct By: 02/12/2025
